blue_oceans.notes: 1.73M community. Production apps are DAWs or casual loop toys. No app gamifies the daily beat-making habit (one new drum pattern, one sample chop, one arrangement section) with streak XP, genre skill trees, and producer level badges.

2.06M community. Yousician has strong streak gamification for instrument technique but music theory (harmony, form, counterpoint) is not the core product. SOFT COMPETITION — gap for a pure daily music theory streak app with XP for concept unlocks, harmony mastery, and ear training level gates.

1.21M community. Apps are synth emulators or linear courses. No app gamifies the daily sound design habit (one new patch built, one modulation technique explored, one synthesis concept applied) with streak XP, synthesis technique trees, and sound designer level badges.

1.87M community. Production apps are environments not habit trackers. No app gamifies the daily music production session (one loop completed, one mix decision documented, one technique practiced) with streak XP, genre mastery badges, and producer skill trees.

4.67M community. Steezy is the strongest competitor but it is a course platform, not a gamified daily streak with XP. No app turns the daily dance habit (one 10-min session, one new footwork pattern, one freestyle log) into a leveling game with skill trees, musicality badges, and streak rewards.

116K focused community. All apps are tutorial video players. No app gamifies the daily b-boy training habit (one foundational move drilled, one power move attempt logged, one footwork session) with streak XP, move unlock trees, and bboy level progression.

230K community. All apps are video tutorial libraries. No app gamifies the daily ballroom habit (one technique drill, one pattern practiced, one timing exercise) with streak XP, dance style badges, and partnership skill level gates.

5.77M community. Apps edit or capture but none gamifies the daily photography skill habit (one composition challenge, one lighting study, one genre-specific assignment) with streak XP, skill badges for exposure, composition, and lighting mastery, and photographer level gates.

1.06M community. All apps are camera tools or editors. No app gamifies the daily street photography habit (one 30-min shoot with one selected frame, one Cartier-Bresson analysis, one light condition challenge) with streak XP, genre badges, and photographer level unlocks.

1.05M community. No app gamifies the daily film photography habit (one roll planned, one exposure decision analyzed, one develop/scan session logged) with streak XP for film stock mastery, zone system badges, and darkroom technique level gates.

1.61M community. Apps are general art tools or dress-up games. No app gamifies the daily fashion sketching habit (one croquis sketch, one silhouette challenge, one fabric drape study) with streak XP, illustration technique badges, and fashion designer level gates.

1.11M community. Apps are references or specialized tools. No app gamifies the daily sewing habit (one new stitch type practiced, one seam finished, one fitting adjustment made) with streak XP, technique badges for zipper mastery, button holes, and tailoring skill level gates.

3.6M community. All apps are resale marketplaces. No app gamifies the daily thrift fashion habit (one styling challenge, one era identification exercise, one outfit-building practice) with streak XP, style badge unlocks, and fashion curator level progression.

7.5M community. Apps organize closets or share outfits. No app gamifies the daily fashion styling habit (one outfit challenge using a styling rule, one color palette exercise, one proportion analysis) with streak XP, style principle badges, and stylist level gates.
